texto: Even a King wishes to be loved for Himself, not for the gifts He bestows." He smiled at me. "If you do not enjoy being with Me now, why do you believe you will enjoy My company for eternity?" He smiled at me. "The pursuer wants to be pursued also." --- Jesus
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Anna Rountree que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Even a King wishes to be loved for Himself, not for the gifts He bestows." He smiled at me. "If y…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, jesus, smiled, com foco em reflexao.
